query:
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(closedAt / 1000), '%Y-%m') AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS trade_count,
  SUM(premiumCollected) AS total_premium,
  SUM(CASE WHEN premiumCollected > 0 THEN premiumCollected ELSE 0 END) AS credits_collected,
  SUM(CASE WHEN premiumCollected < 0 THEN premiumCollected ELSE 0 END) AS debits_paid,
  AVG(premiumCollected) AS avg_premium
FROM closedPositions
WHERE closedAt IS NOT NULL
  AND FROM_UNIXTIME(closedAt / 1000) >= '2025-12-01'
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month;
